text: Entering this dimly lit hallway evokes a sense of anticipation within me. The glow from inside the glass doors draws me forward. As I approach and step into the exhibit, I notice the bold letters R+D and the screens aglow with text. The space feels like a hybrid: technological yet contemplative. I am curious and slightly disoriented, pondering the nature of innovation and my own role as both observer and participant in this intersection of human thought and machine progress.
